title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about HummyTummy.

items.question: What is HummyTummy?
items.answer: HummyTummy is a cloud-based restaurant management platform that unifies POS, kitchen display, menu and table management, QR ordering and reporting in a single product.

items.question: Which devices can I use?
items.answer: Any modern device with a browser — desktops, tablets and phones. A standalone desktop app is also available for Windows and macOS.

items.question: How do I change the language?
items.answer: Use the language switcher in the header. English, Turkish, Russian, Uzbek and Arabic are supported. The selected language is remembered on the device.

items.question: Where can I see sales reports and analytics?
items.answer: Go to Reports or Analytics from the admin menu. You will find revenue, top products, hourly breakdowns and more.

items.question: How do I create an order in the POS?
items.answer: Open the POS, pick a table or start a takeaway order, add products from the menu panel to the cart, then process payment or send the order to the kitchen.

items.question: Can I split a bill between customers?
items.answer: Yes. Open the order cart, choose the split option and divide the bill by item or by amount.

items.question: How do I add a new product to the menu?
items.answer: Go to Menu Management, open a category or create one, then click "Add Product". Fill in the name, price, description and upload an image.

items.question: Where do I manage stock levels?
items.answer: From Stock Management under the admin menu. You can adjust inventory, track ingredients and receive low-stock alerts.

items.question: How do I add and edit tables?
items.answer: Go to Table Management. You can add, rename and mark tables as occupied or available directly from the grid.

items.question: Can customers reserve tables online?
items.answer: Yes. Reservations can be taken via the public reservation link and managed from the Reservations page in the admin panel.

items.question: How does the Kitchen Display work?
items.answer: The Kitchen page shows orders in Pending, Preparing and Ready columns with live updates and urgency indicators so the team always knows what to cook next.

items.question: How do I move an order forward in the kitchen?
items.answer: Click the action button on the order card (e.g. "Start Preparing" or "Mark Ready"). The status updates in real time for everyone using the system.

items.question: How do I create QR codes for my tables?
items.answer: Go to QR Management, pick "Table QR" and generate one per table. You can customise colours and add your logo.

items.question: Can I download or print all QR codes at once?
items.answer: Yes — use the "Download all" or "Print sheet" option on the QR Management page.

items.question: What does my QR menu look like to customers?
items.answer: Customers scan the QR code and see a branded menu where they can browse categories, add items to a cart and place an order without installing an app.

items.question: Can I change my subscription plan?
items.answer: Yes. Go to Settings → Subscription and pick a new plan. Changes apply at the next billing cycle, or immediately where applicable.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel at any time. Your account stays active until the end of the paid period.

items.question: How do I add staff members?
items.answer: Go to Personnel Management and create users with roles such as Admin, Manager, Waiter or Kitchen. Each role has its own permissions and dashboard.

items.question: How do I reset my password?
items.answer: Click "Forgot password" on the login page and follow the email link, or change your password from your profile if you are already signed in.

items.question: How do I get alerts for new orders and waiter calls?
items.answer: The bell icon in the header shows live notifications for new orders, waiter calls and bill requests from customers.
